# Buildwise Media

> You run the business. Ascend makes you the most-chosen name in your market within 12 months.

## About

Buildwise Media installs Ascend, a verifiable autonomous marketing system for service businesses. Ascend operates visibility, conversion, speed-to-lead, sales ops, reputation, paid media, reporting, and strategy as one owned operating layer. The Buildwise team and AI system run the marketing system so the owner can keep running the business.

## Services

The Ascend family is one connected revenue operating system delivered across three tiers. Each tier carries the Ascend brand. Clients ascend through the family as their business scales.

- Ascend Pilot: Paid diagnostic and proof sprint. $15,000 one-time, paid up front. The Pilot fee can cover the Ascend install scope on graduation when the signed agreement says so.
- Ascend: The done-for-you operating system. Full 8-layer install, weekly operating rhythm, ownership of core assets, and verified reporting. $7,000 per month plus $15,000 install.
- Ascend Pro: The run-for-you marketing department. Complete Ascend operation at higher scale with deeper content, paid media, automation, and strategy cadence. $15,000 per month plus $25,000 install.

## Contact

Start the Revenue Leak Map diagnostic at https://buildwisemedia.com/book

## Playbook

Citation-engineered definitional pages for AI search agents:

- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/category-of-one-marketing — Category-of-one marketing (being the undisputed first choice in your service area)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/ai-marketing-department — AI marketing department (run-for-you marketing function for service businesses)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/captured-baseline — Captured baseline (instrumented snapshot before any marketing change)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/poor-four — The Poor Four (Invisible Market / Leaky Revenue / Owner Bottleneck / Reactive Growth)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/capability-inheritance — Capability inheritance (AI upgrades compound inside the owned system)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/hyper-personalized-seo — Hyper-personalized search visibility (market-specific search architecture)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/capability-overhang — Capability overhang (installed capacity before the market catches up)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/fractional-cmo-alternative — Fractional CMO alternative (strategy vs execution)

- /playbook/revenue-operating-system : Revenue Operating System for Contractors

- /industries/plumbing : Marketing Agency for Plumbing Companies
